ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image in pixels */,
  "roi_x1" INTEGER /* X coordinate of the top-left corner of the ROI */,
  "roi_y1" INTEGER /* Y coordinate of the top-left corner of the ROI */,
  "roi_x2" INTEGER /* X coordinate of the bottom-right corner of the ROI */,
  "roi_y2" INTEGER /* Y coordinate of the bottom-right corner of the ROI */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Class label identifier for the detected object */,
  "path" TEXT /* File path of the image */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 720p, 1080p) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the dataset the image belongs to */,
  "capture_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was captured */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the image (e.g., camera type, external dataset) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class representing the object */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "parent_class_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the parent class (for hierarchical structures) */,
  "confidence_threshold" REAL /* Minimum confidence level for classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., bounding box, polygon) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_annotations_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the model being evaluated */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the dataset */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model's performance */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model's predictions */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model's predictions */,
  "date_evaluated" TEXT /* Date when the model was evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the dataset used in the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's functionality */,
  "framework" TEXT /* ML framework used (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Time taken to train the model in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file record */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image associated with the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the image file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., image, metadata) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_files_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the image */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
